Klasse RuleManager

java.lang.Object
boardLogic.RuleManager
public class RuleManager extends Object
The RuleManager is responsible for checking the validity of moves and managing game rules. It checks if moves are valid, counts mills formed, and determines if the game is over.

    • RuleManager

      public RuleManager()

  • Methodendetails

    • getInstance

      public static RuleManager getInstance()
      Creates a new Instance of this Manager, if there is none already.
      Gibt zurück:
      Instance if one already existed, creates a new one otherwise.

    • isMoveValid

      public boolean isMoveValid(PlayerEntity player, Node fromNode, Node toNode)
      Checks if the intended move is valid for the current game phase.
      Parameter:
      player - The player that intends to perform a move.
      fromNode - The origin node (can be null in SettingPhase).
      toNode - The target node.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if move is valid, false otherwise.
      Siehe auch:
      • checkGeneralErrors(PlayerEntity, Node, Node)
      • checkSpecificErrors(PlayerEntity, Node, Node)

    • checkGeneralErrors

      private String checkGeneralErrors(PlayerEntity player, Node fromNode, Node toNode)
      Helper method for isMoveValid(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) method.

      Checks for general errors that can occur in any game phase.

      Parameter:
      player - The player that intends to perform a move.
      fromNode - The origin node (can be null in SettingPhase).
      toNode - The target node.
      Gibt zurück:
      A string containing error messages, empty if no errors occurred.

    • checkSpecificErrors

      private String checkSpecificErrors(PlayerEntity player, Node fromNode, Node toNode)
      Helper method for isMoveValid(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) method.

      Checks for specific errors that can occur in certain game phases.

      Parameter:
      player - The player that intends to perform a move.
      fromNode - The origin node (can be null in SettingPhase).
      toNode - The target node.
      Gibt zurück:
      A string containing error messages, empty if no errors occurred.

    • isRemovalValid

      public boolean isRemovalValid(PlayerEntity remover, Node targetNode)
      Checks if the removal of a stone is valid. A stone can only be removed if it is not part of a mill, unless all remaining stones of the opponent are part of a mill.
      Parameter:
      remover - The player that intends to remove a stone.
      targetNode - The node where the stone to be removed is located.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the removal is valid, false otherwise.

    • countMillsFormed

      public int countMillsFormed(Stone lastPlacedStone)
      Counts the new mills formed with the newly placed or moved stone. Only gets called when a move is made, otherwise multiple mills would be formed.
      Parameter:
      lastPlacedStone - The stone that potentially formed one or two mills.
      Gibt zurück:
      The amount of new mills formed.
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if the amount of newly formed mills is greater than 2.

    • countMillsFormed

      public int countMillsFormed(Node[] move, PlayerEntity player)
      This method is specifically used to identify mills formed for planning a move by the CPU. It simulates a move by temporarily placing a stone on the target node and checking how many mills would be formed.

      It does not affect the actual game state and is used for planning purposes.

      Parameter:
      move - The move to be simulated, containing the from and to nodes.
      player - The player who is making the move.
      Gibt zurück:
      The number of mills formed by the simulated move.

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver(PlayerEntity playerWhite, PlayerEntity playerBlack)
      Checks if the game is over and sets the winner if so.

      Conditions for game over:

      1. A player has only 2 stones left (is in GameOverPhase).
      2. No mill was formed for 20 turns.
      3. A player can't move a stone to a valid position anymore (is in MovingPhase).
      4. The turn timer has run out.
      Parameter:
      playerWhite - The first player.
      playerBlack - The second player.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the game is over, false otherwise.
      Siehe auch:
      • isPlayerGameOver(PlayerEntity)
      • isPlayerBlocked(PlayerEntity)
      • isStalemate()

    • isPlayerGameOver

      private boolean isPlayerGameOver(PlayerEntity player)
      Helper method for isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) method.

      Checks if the player is in the game over phase (only 2 stones left). Sets the loss cause to STONECOUNT if so.

      Parameter:
      player - The player that gets checked.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the player is in game over phase, false otherwise.

    • isPlayerBlocked

      public boolean isPlayerBlocked(PlayerEntity player)
      Helper method for isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) method.

      Checks if the player can perform any valid moves (is blocked). Sets the loss cause to BLOCKED if the player is blocked.

      Parameter:
      player - The player that gets checked.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the player can't do any valid moves anymore, false otherwise.

    • isStalemate

      public boolean isStalemate()
      Helper method for isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) method.

      Checks how many turns no mill was formed for. Sets the loss cause to STALEMATE if there was no mill for 20 turns.

      Gibt zurück:
      true if there was no mill for 20 turns, false otherwise.
